narrative:
Trimble Village (precinct in Athens County) has 152 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.1 percentage points.
